description: Senior Data Scientist designing end-to-end agentic workflows focused on FinTech and Healthcare use cases. Experienced in LLM fine-tuning, agent orchestration, knowledge graph architecture, reinforcement learning, and evaluation frameworks—with growing focus on AI safety paradigms.
Delivered insurance technology projects on the Guidewire suite (Policy Center, HPExstream, GOSU); 3 Applause and 4 Spot awards.

Enhanced Course Publishing analytics using SQL.
